# BlendBusters

> Independent wellness-product comparisons. We break down expensive supplements, compare ingredients, doses, and price against lower-cost ingredient-matched options, and publish the data. We compare ingredients and price, not medical outcomes; a match is not a guaranteed equivalent. Affiliate-supported, editorially independent.

## Key resources
- [The Supplement Markup Report](https://blendbusters.com/markup-report.html): 177 products priced, ~5.5x average markup, downloadable dataset (CC BY 4.0)
- [Methodology](https://blendbusters.com/methodology.html): the eight questions every comparison answers
- [Savings Index](https://blendbusters.com/savings-index.html)
- [About](https://blendbusters.com/about.html)

## Categories
- [Collagen Joint](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-collagen-joint-alternatives.html)
- [Electrolyte](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-electrolyte-alternatives.html)
- [Energy Supplement](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-energy-supplement-alternatives.html)
- [Greens Multivitamin](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-greens-multivitamin-alternatives.html)
- [Longevity Heart](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-longevity-heart-alternatives.html)
- [Mens Supplement](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-mens-supplement-alternatives.html)
- [Nootropic](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-nootropic-alternatives.html)
- [Probiotic Gut](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-probiotic-gut-alternatives.html)
- [Protein Fitness](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-protein-fitness-alternatives.html)
- [Sleep Calm](https://blendbusters.com/cheaper-sleep-calm-alternatives.html)
